items.title: Bijlow debuteert in Serie A met spectaculaire zege, De Roon scoort voor Atalanta
items.summary: Justin Bijlow heeft vijf dagen na zijn overstap direct zijn debuut gemaakt voor Genoa. De 28-jarige doelman stond onder de lat bij een spectaculaire zege op Bologna. Marten de Roon was op hetzelfde tijdstip trefzeker bij een winnend Atalanta.

items.title: VI Live: Drommel ontpopt zich tot uitblinker van Sparta
items.summary: Zondag wordt er weer volop gevoetbald in binnen- en buitenland. AZ gaat om 12.15 uur op bezoek bij Telstar, FC Groningen speelt tegen Fortuna Sittard, FC Utrecht ontvangt Sparta Rotterdam en ook in het buitenland staat ons veel moois te wachten. Volg het in de VI Live.

items.title: VI Live: Jordan Bos herstelt fout snel en schiet Feyenoord weer op voorsprong
items.summary: Feyenoord en Heracles Almelo staan zondagmiddag om 16.45 uur tegenover elkaar in de Eredivisie. De Rotterdammers verspeelden vier competitieduels op rij punten en azen dus op eerherstel. Dat kan tegen de hekkensluiter van Nederland. Volg het duel in de VI Live.

items.title: Chelsea beat 10-man Palace at Selhurst Park to move fourth
items.summary: FREE TO WATCH: Highlights from Crystal Palace’s match against Chelsea in the Premier League.

items.title: Forest claim crucial win to move FIVE clear of relegation zone
items.summary: FREE TO WATCH: Highlights from Brentford’s match against Nottingham Forest in the Premier League.

items.title: Leicester sack boss Cifuentes after just six months
items.summary: Marti Cifuentes is sacked as Leicester City manager after just six months in charge with the Foxes in the bottom half of the Championship.

items.title: Arsenal v Manchester United: Premier League – live
items.summary: ⚽ Updates from 4.30pm GMT fixture at Emirates Stadium ⚽ Jonathan Wilson: is Carrick more than the new Solskjær? ⚽ Scores | Tables | Premier League top scorers Michael Carrick’s on picking an unchanged XI It’s never the same again! Every game is different but we’ve had a good week and we’re in good shape. We understand this has been a tough place to come for many teams. But we’re going into the game in a good spirit and that’s the most important thing. We have to work game by game. We have to understand where each individual is, who were going to play and then make a decision. Continue reading...

items.title: Newcastle 0-2 Aston Villa, Crystal Palace 1-3 Chelsea and more: football clockwatch – live
items.summary: ⚽ Updates from Sunday’s 2pm Premier League matches ⚽ Jonathan Wilson: is Carrick more than the new Solskjær? ⚽ Scores | Tables | Mail Daniel with any thoughts Oh, but here’s Rosenior, explaining that Cole Palmer isn’t fit to play today, but has a chance of making Wednesday’s trip to Naples. He notes that the league is close and physical, but he has good players and is excited to see where the project goes – the club “demands winning in this moment”. There aren’t many days on the training pitch, but he hopes the work they’re doing with the team and with individuals are working. Continue reading...

items.title: Buendia scores wonder strike as Aston Villa secure away win over Newcastle
items.summary: FREE TO WATCH: Highlights from Newcastle’s match against Aston Villa in the Premier League.

items.title: Sources: Fulham bid $38m for USMNT's Pepi
items.summary: Fulham have made a bid of €32 million ($38m) for the services of PSV forward Ricardo Pepi, sources have told ESPN.

items.title: Estêvão on scoresheet as Chelsea brush Palace aside
items.summary: Estêvão opened the scoring and added an assist as Chelsea secured a 3-1 victory over 10-man Crystal Palace.

items.title: Aston Villa dream alive after beating Newcastle
items.summary: Emi Buendia's sweet strike set Aston Villa on their way to a hard-fought 2-0 Premier League win at Newcastle.

items.title: Van Dijk: No problem with Liverpool 'togetherness'
items.summary: Virgil van Dijk believes Liverpool lack consistency but not togetherness after the club's hopes of Champions League qualification were dealt a blow.

items.title: Almada strikes as Atlético cruise past Mallorca
items.summary: Atlético Madrid earned back-to-back LaLiga wins with a 3-0 victory over Mallorca.

items.title: Chelsea win convincingly at Palace to move up to fourth
items.summary: Chelsea moved into the Champions League places with a 3-1 win over out-of-form Crystal Palace at Selhurst Park.

items.title: 'Unmissable storylines everywhere!' - Why it was a pivotal weekend in the WSL
items.summary: When the ticker tape has settled, the WSL trophy handed out and we find out who will be competing in the league next season, this weekend of WSL football in late January will be earmarked as the most pivotal of the 2025/26 campaign.

items.title: Aston Villa houdt titelkandidaten in het vizier, Chelsea passeert Liverpool
items.summary: Aston Villa blijft zich brutaal melden in de Engelse titelstrijd. De ploeg van Unai Emery revancheerde zich op bezoek bij Newcastle United van de nederlaag tegen Everton. Ook Chelsea wist zondagmiddag te winnen. Met een eenvoudige zege op Crystal Palace gingen de Londenaren het Liverpool van Arne Slot weer voorbij op de ranglijst.

items.title: Van Persie laat Deijl 'eerst even landen' en heeft tips voor Gonçalo Borges
items.summary: Mats Deijl start zondag tegen Heracles Almelo direct in de basis bij Feyenoord. De kersverse aanwinst is daar fit genoeg voor, wat volgens trainer Robin van Persie sowieso één van zijn sterke punten is. Wel krijgt de rechtsback de tijd om even te wennen van zijn coach, die ook in ging op 'ruwe diamant' Gonçalo Borges.

items.title: Portsmouth out of relegation zone after Adams goal in feisty Southampton draw
items.summary: Portsmouth climbed out of the Championship relegation zone after Ebou Adams marked his home debut with a 77th-minute equaliser to secure a 1-1 draw with their fierce rivals Southampton. Saints were on course for a first league win at Fratton Park in 50 years following Léo Scienza’s 57th-minute opener. But the visitors were denied south-coast bragging rights when the Pompey midfielder Adams – a January signing from Derby – headed in following an Adrian Segecic corner, to spark wild celebrations. Continue reading...

items.title: Manchester City go nine points clear in WSL after Shaw’s late strike at London City
items.summary: Manchester City are beginning to look like champions elect after going nine points clear at the top of the Women’s Super League with nine games to play, striking late to claim a precious victory at London City Lionesses. Khadija Shaw was the calmest person in the ground as she slotted in a low finish in the 86th minute after a goalmouth scramble, before leaping in delight in front of the travelling supporters as they celebrated her winner and avoided what had looked set to be a rare slip-up in Bromley. Continue reading...
